2. freshdesk
```javascript
<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center bg-white p-1">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="freshdesk" className="w-full h-full object-contain rounded-sm" />
    </div>
````

3. zendesk

```javascript
  <svg
        fill="currentColor"
        role="img"
        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
        className="h-full w-full"
        xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
      >
        <path d="M12.914 2.904V16.29L24 2.905H12.914zM0 2.906C0 5.966 2.483 8.45 5.543 8.45s5.542-2.484 5.543-5.544H0zm11.086 4.807L0 21.096h11.086V7.713zm7.37 7.84c-3.063 0-5.542 2.48-5.542 5.543H24c0-3.06-2.48-5.543-5.543-5.543z" />
      </svg>
    </div>
```

4. crisp

```javascript
<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center bg-white p-1">
  <img
    src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"
    alt="crisp"
    className="h-full w-full rounded-sm object-contain"
  />
</div>
```

5. slack

```javascript
<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center bg-white p-1">
  <img
    src="data:image/png;base64,"
    alt="slack"
    className="h-full w-full rounded-sm object-contain"
  />
</div>
```

6. messenger

```javascript
<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-tr from-blue-600 to-purple-500 text-white">
  <svg fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24" className="h-6 w-6">
    <path d="M12 2C6.477 2 2 6.145 2 11.258c0 2.91 1.488 5.513 3.82 7.23V22l3.48-1.92c1.23.344 2.535.534 3.88.534 6.242 0 10-4.145 10-9.258C23.18 6.145 18.703 2 12 2Zm1.083 12.336-2.825-3.02-5.503 3.02 6.04-6.425 2.87 3.02 5.46-3.02-6.042 6.425Z" />
  </svg>
</div>
```

7. google chat

```javascript
<div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center bg-white p-1">
  <img
    src="data:image/png;base64,"
    alt="googlechat"
    className="h-full w-full rounded-sm object-contain"
  />
</div>
```
